name: quarto-helpers
description: Autocomplete and editor support for Quarto documents (shortcodes, Sass variables, RevealJS features, and more)

quartoHelpers.enableSassVariableCompleti.description: Enable Sass variable autocomplete in .scss files

quartoHelpers.enableIncludeShortcodeComp.description: Enable file path autocomplete for {{< include >}} shortcodes

quartoHelpers.enableVarShortcodeCompleti.description: Enable variable autocomplete for {{< var >}} shortcodes

quartoHelpers.enableMetaShortcodeComplet.description: Enable metadata autocomplete for {{< meta >}} shortcodes

quartoHelpers.enableShortcodeCompletion.description: Enable shortcode name autocomplete for {{< >}} syntax

quartoHelpers.enableFragmentCompletion.description: Enable fragment animation autocomplete for RevealJS presentations

quartoHelpers.enableAbsolutePositionComp.description: Enable absolute positioning attribute autocomplete for RevealJS

quartoHelpers.enableStyleCompletion.description: Enable CSS property autocomplete inside style="" attributes
